heading: Imports
label: 2104 Imports
text: Any item imported into the United States in violation of section 2101(a) or (b) of this title or regulations under shall be subject to seizure and forfeiture under the customs laws.section 2101(c) of this title
notes: Effective DateSection applicable only to imitation political items and imitation numismatic items manufactured after , see , set out as a note under .Nov. 29, 1973section 8 of Pub. L. 93–167section 2101 of this title
